title: GPT-4 baseline vs INT4-quantized — 5 prompts
description: Realistic side-by-side outputs across quantization tiers. Submit the `request` payload to POST /compare/quantization to get a full degradation report and recommendation.
prompts: What is the capital of France?
Write a haiku about the ocean.
Summarize the plot of Hamlet in two sentences.

baseline_outputs: The capital of France is Paris, located in the north-central region along the Seine River.
Photosynthesis is the process by which plants convert sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide into glucose and oxygen.

Endless rolling waves
Whisper secrets to the shore
Moonlight on blue depths

Hamlet is a Danish prince who learns from his father's ghost that his uncle Claudius murdered the king to seize the throne. Driven by grief and a quest for vengeance, Hamlet's hesitation and feigned madness culminate in a tragic finale where nearly every major character, including himself, dies.

int8: The capital of France is Paris, located in the north of the country along the Seine River.
Photosynthesis is the process by which plants convert sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide into glucose and oxygen.

Endless rolling waves
Whisper secrets to the shore
Moonlight on blue depths

Hamlet is a prince of Denmark who is told by his father's ghost that his uncle killed the king to take the throne. His hesitation and pretended madness end in a tragedy where nearly every major character dies.
int4: The capital of France is Paris, in the north along the Seine.
Photosynthesis is when plants use sunlight and water to make food and oxygen.

Rolling ocean waves
Whisper to the sandy shore
Blue depths under moon
Hamlet is a prince of Denmark whose father was killed by his uncle. He seeks revenge and most characters die.
int2: Plants use light to make food.

Ocean waves
Shore sand
Moon blue

notes: INT8 preserves nearly all rubric criteria — retains ~96% of baseline aggregate quality.
INT4 shows visible compression: shorter outputs, simpler vocabulary; retention drops to ~78%.
INT2 is heavily compressed — answers carry the gist but lose nuance and completeness; retention ~62%.
Recommended tier at tolerance=0.10 is int8 (within 10% retention loss). Loosening tolerance to ~0.25 would surface int4.
